microsoft_ft: Deployed into Azure's highest-value enterprise accounts — Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp — to architect resilience integrations and deliver **$14M+ in business impact**, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized, self-service system.

Led **0→1 build** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining data models, API integrations, and self-service scheduling workflows that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable deployment across customer engagements.

Shipped Azure's first rack-level proactive resilience drill in **4 months**, architecting the end-to-end validation workflow, surfacing critical hardware defects, and achieving a 94% recovery rate — establishing a new continuous-validation motion.

Served as technical counterpart and bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility with zero customer-impacting failures.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning using LLM-powered automation, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and expand drill capacity by 21% — shipping reusable tooling adopted across the broader solutions team.

Acted as direct feedback loop between enterprise customers and the product roadmap, synthesizing deployment blockers and under-adoption patterns into actionable insights that shaped platform prioritization across quarterly planning cycles.

Designed scalable engagement models — from self-serve playbooks to expert-led build sprints — matching technical support to customer need and driving consistent **GTM stack** outcomes across Attio-equivalent enterprise rollouts.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by running live customer demos and hands-on training sessions, driving utilization across 14 key teams and saving 37 engineering hours monthly through workflow automation.

Identified critical GTM feature gaps by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation — closing the loop between customer insight and roadmap delivery.

Improved data integrity and cut lookup time by **83%** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, enabling faster self-serve access across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating buy-in across 140+ teams with competing GTM and operational priorities.

Ran structured discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a phased automation roadmap targeting the highest-toil critical paths — directly informing the platform's no-code workflow strategy.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of the highest-impact customer-facing deployment improvements.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and sequencing rollout to protect live production environments throughout.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to keep the cross-functional deployment on schedule and unblocked.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and building a repeatable release model for future fleet-wide rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by rebuilding the end-to-end CRM process for 200+ monthly proposals — streamlining scoping, quoting, and invoicing workflows so the sales team could move faster without losing deal context or follow-up fidelity.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first GTM strategy — optimizing the website, Google Business profile, and inbound funnel to match how target customers actually discover and evaluate vendors.

Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model improvements that gave leadership a repeatable framework for scoping and quoting high-margin work.
